Tours & Experiences

Greenville, the way
locals live it

New to town, visiting, or just looking for something unforgettable? Ride with expert drivers who know every corner of the Upstate.

City Tours

See Greenville right

$130 1 hour

Essential GVL

Downtown Greenville basics — Falls Park, Main Street, local landmarks. The perfect introduction to the city.

Up to 14
Book This Tour
$260 2 hours

Essential GVL Plus

Extended tour: downtown, Furman University, Travelers Rest, Paris Mountain. See what makes the Upstate special.

Up to 14
Book This Tour
$80 1 hour

Downtown Cart Tour

Open-air golf cart ride through Main Street. End-to-end downtown experience at $5/person walking pace.

Up to 5
Book This Tour
Curated Experiences

Pick your adventure

Brewery Tours

Greenville's best craft breweries. We drive, you taste.

Wine Tours

Upstate vineyards and wineries. Full-day or half-day routes.

Tailgate Packages

Clemson, Furman, USC — arrive in style with the whole crew.

Ghost Tours

Greenville's haunted history after dark. Seasonal availability.

Golf Packages

CEO Sprinter to the course and back. Clubs stay safe, you stay relaxed.

Range Day

Firearms training with ex-law enforcement officers. Transport included.

Kids Birthday

Downtown ride with ice cream stop. The birthday kid rides up front.

Helicopter Tour

Aerial view of Greenville. See the city from a perspective nobody else offers.

Don't see what you need? Tell us your idea and we'll plan it for you. Industrial and commercial site tours also available.

Seasonal Specials

Limited-time experiences

Holiday Lights Tours
Fall Foliage Tours
Halloween Package (includes MADWORLD with discounted tickets)
Ask About Seasonal Tours
